<Badge text="workers-best-practices" variant="note" /> <Badge text="18 words" variant="default" /> <Badge text="Curated" variant="note" /> <Badge text="install-now-after-trust-gate" variant="default" />

> Curated third-party skill source. Run external-skill-auditor before repo promotion.

<div class="quick-start">

### Quick Start

**Install:**
```bash
npx skills add cloudflare/skills --skill cloudflare --skill wrangler --skill workers-best-practices --skill durable-objects --skill agents-sdk -y -g -a antigravity claude-code codex crush cursor gemini-cli github-copilot grok opencode
```

**Use:** `/workers-best-practices`

</div>

Works with [Claude Code](https://docs.anthropic.com/en/docs/claude-code), [Gemini CLI](https://github.com/google-gemini/gemini-cli), [OpenCode](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode), and other [agentskills.io](https://agentskills.io)-compatible agents.

<Aside type="note" title="Source & provenance">
This page is generated from curated config (`docs/src/authoring/skills/workers-best-practices.mdx`) and local inventory when installed.
</Aside>

## Harness Coverage

Targets verified harnesses: `antigravity`, `claude-code`, `codex`, `crush`, `cursor`, `gemini-cli`, `github-copilot`, `grok`, `opencode`.

**Portable multi-harness install command:**
```bash
npx skills add cloudflare/skills --skill cloudflare --skill wrangler --skill workers-best-practices --skill durable-objects --skill agents-sdk -y -g -a antigravity claude-code codex crush cursor gemini-cli github-copilot grok opencode
```

## Trust / Audit

Trust tier: **Curated** (`curated-trust-gated`)

Curated status: `install-now-after-trust-gate`

Risk notes: Curated third-party skill source. Run external-skill-auditor before repo promotion.

Entry maintained in `config/external-skills.md`; provenance and audit notes are authoritative there (research context is advisory).

## Purpose

workers-best-practices encodes production rules and anti-patterns for authoring/reviewing Cloudflare Workers code: streaming responses, waitUntil usage, no global request state, no floating promises, binding access via generated types, crypto for randomness, secrets handling, observability config, and wrangler.jsonc practices. Retrieval-first; tells agents to fetch latest best-practices page and types before flagging.

## Install Prerequisites

Part of `npx skills add cloudflare/skills --skill workers-best-practices ...`

## Upstream Maintainer

Cloudflare (https://github.com/cloudflare/skills). Canonical source: https://developers.cloudflare.com/workers/best-practices/

## Comparable Alternatives

General edge function best practices from other platforms when porting patterns; project-specific linters and review checklists.

&gt; Evidence gathered from public GitHub (raw SKILL.md). Not an endorsement or authority.
